title: pplxstudio routing table
description: The edge map for the btb hub. Each row binds one real domain to one pplx.app target. Adding a work = adding a row. This file is the artifact; it is meant to be hashed into the Pontifex ledger.

injection.description: Hard constraint. The edge must never inject. If this is ever not 'none', the transparency promise is broken.

aliases.description: additional hostnames routed to the same target (www, alt spellings)

seat.description: canonical provenance seat or storefront identity

target.description: pplx.app hostname, no scheme, e.g. bns-ai.pplx.app. Empty until built.

status.description: 'brain' = interaction-tier host serving the edge LLM broker instead of a pass-through target

sealed.description: true once this row's binding is hashed into the ledger

brain.description: Present only on interaction-tier rows that broker an LLM at the edge. The pass-through injection:none constraint still holds — the brain is a separate path, not injection into proxied responses.

path.description: the one path the brain owns, e.g. /api/chat

broker.description: the key is held server-side at the edge; the browser never sees it

key.description: reference to the Worker secret holding the LLM key, never the key itself
